**Do not use this for security vulnerabilities.** Report those privately -- see
[SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).

## Component

Which binary/library (smtpd, pop3d, imapd, session-manager, mail-deliver,
mail-session, mail-remote, queue-manager, auth, msgstore, webadmin, auth-oidc,
userctl)?

## Version / commit

Release tag or commit SHA you're running.

## What happened

A clear description of the behavior, including any relevant log lines (redact
addresses and credentials).

## What you expected

What you expected to happen instead.

OS, Go version (if building from source), Docker vs. native, anything else
